sectionParenting.strategy: GeoNames PPLX rows are parented to larger populated places by shared admin codes, admin2 code names, or nearby large city fallback.
sectionParenting.sectionPopulationRule: Configured administrative city sections can be included below the city population threshold when their parent city is above it.
